name: get_hospitals_by_surgery_cost
description: Find hospitals where surgery/treatment costs fall within a specified range. Use this when users mention budget amounts, cost ranges, or price limits. Supports three modes: less than (max_cost only), greater than (min_cost only), or between (both parameters). Costs are in Indian Rupees. Returns hospitals sorted by average cost ascending.

min_cost.description: Minimum cost threshold in Indian Rupees. Use this alone for 'costs more than X' or 'above X budget' queries. Use with max_cost for 'between X and Y' queries. Optional parameter.

max_cost.description: Maximum cost threshold in Indian Rupees. Use this alone for 'costs less than X' or 'under X budget' or 'below X' queries. Use with min_cost for 'between X and Y' queries. Optional parameter.
